title: Tinybird Data Source
description: Schema for a Tinybird Data Source resource representing an ingested dataset

id.description: Unique identifier for the data source

cluster.description: Cluster the data source belongs to

tags.description: Key-value tags for the data source

schema.description: ClickHouse-compatible schema definition for the data source columns

created_at.description: Timestamp when the data source was created

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the data source was last updated

row_count.description: Total number of rows in the data source

replicated.description: Whether the data source is replicated across nodes

ttl_expression.description: Time-to-live expression for automatic data expiration

statistics.description: Runtime statistics for the data source
